top_signals.title: Japan’s Finance Chief Pledges Bold Action for Weak Yen as Needed
top_signals.summary: Japan’s Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama indicated her resolve to intervene in a foreign exchange market to prop up the yen as needed as her Group of Seven counterparts understand the nation’s stance.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

alerts.title: Japan’s Finance Chief Pledges Bold Action for Weak Yen as Needed
alerts.summary: Japan’s Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama indicated her resolve to intervene in a foreign exchange market to prop up the yen as needed as her Group of Seven counterparts understand the nation’s stance.
alerts.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
